articles.title: Illegal Lucknow building had 2016 demolition order, someone revoked it within 60 days
articles.summary: A devastating fire has cast a shadow over a Lucknow building's past. Documents reveal a 2016 demolition order for unauthorized construction was controversially revoked within two months.

articles.title: Telangana school bandh today: Schools likely to remain closed as ABVP protests fee hikes and reforms
articles.summary: ABVP has called for a statewide school bandh in Telangana over concerns related to private school fee hikes, government school infrastructure gaps, vacant teaching posts and delayed uniform distribution. Several schools in Hyderabad announced holidays ahead of the protest.

articles.title: CBSE revaluation miracle: Ranchi student's score jumps from 95.2% to 500/500 after gaining 24 marks
articles.summary: The release of the CBSE Class 12 revaluation results on June 22 brought an extraordinary success story from Ranchi. Commerce student Avani Kejriwal's score increased by 24 marks after re-evaluation, taking her from 95.2 per cent to a perfect 500 out of 500.

articles.title: UGC NET June 2026 re-exam scheduled for affected candidates at this centre; check details here
articles.summary: The National Testing Agency has announced a re-examination for candidates affected by technical issues during the UGC NET June 2026 Shift I examination at the CT Group of Institutions Examination Centre, Jalandhar. The re-test will be conducted on July 5, 2026, at 3:00 PM at the same venue.

articles.title: Assam HSLC Compartment result 2026 to be out today at sebaonline.org: Check steps to download scorecards
articles.summary: The Assam State School Education Board (ASSEB) is set to announce the HSLC Compartment Result 2026 on June 23 at 11 AM. Students who appeared for the supplementary Class 10 examinations can access their scorecards online using their roll number and login credentials.
